source_meaning: to tilt at windmills (to fight a losing battle)
target_meaning: to overestimate one's capabilities; to attack a stronger opponent as the weaker side which is sure to end in failure

target_idiom: mất hút con mẹ hàng lươn
source_meaning: to get caught red-handed (to get caught immediately after doing something wrong or illegal)
target_meaning: to be gone without a trace after committing misdeeds

source_meaning: and so on, and so forth
target_meaning: anyway, anyhow, in any case, be that as it may, nevertheless
after three attempts, the chance of the success decreases greatly

source_meaning: to play a role, to have an influence [since 19th century]
target_meaning: having power or influence in society; powerful; influential
may you have a safe journey; bon voyage
utterly alone; isolated without family, friends, or support

source_idiom: لا يسمن ولا يغني من جوع
للنجاح ألف أب وللهزيمة طفل يتيم
source_meaning: Everyone wants to claim responsibility for success but no one for failure.
target_meaning: incompetent but good at making excuses

source_meaning: a choice between two unpleasant alternatives; between a rock and a hard place, between the hammer and the anvil, between the devil and the deep blue sea
target_meaning: extreme adversity marks the beginning of fortune; when worse comes to the worst, things will turn for the better
